title: Web SQL databases should be avoided
description: Web SQL databases should not be usedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalsecurityVulnerabilitytype-dependentWhy is this an issue?More InfoThe Web SQL Database standard never saw the light of day. It was first formulated, then deprecated by the W3C and was only implemented in some browsers. (It is not supported in Firefox or IE.)Further, the use of a Web SQL Database poses security concerns, since you only need its name to access such a database.Noncompliant code examplevar db = window.openDatabase("myDb", "1.0", "Personal secrets stored here", 2*1024*1024); // NoncompliantAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-p
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

noncompliant: var db = window.openDatabase("myDb", "1.0", "Personal secrets stored here", 2*1024*1024);  // Noncompliant
